questions.question: Which best describes the original Mitchell et al. (2019) Model Card?
options: A 'nutrition label' for ML models: training data, intended use, factors, metrics, evaluation data, quantitative disaggregated analyses, ethical considerations, caveats
questions.question_zh: 下列哪一项最贴切地描述了 Mitchell et al. (2019) 提出的原始 Model Card?
options_zh: 一种 OpenAPI 规范
ML 模型的「营养标签」: 训练数据、用途、影响因素、指标、评估数据、量化分组分析、伦理考量、注意事项
仅是模型 checkpoint 清单
一份监管法律合同

questions.question: What did Oreamuno et al. (2023) find about ethical-considerations adoption in Hugging Face model cards?
options: No model card has any text at all
questions.question_zh: Oreamuno et al. (2023) 关于 Hugging Face model card 中伦理考量章节的覆盖情况发现了什么?
options_zh: 约 0.3% 记录了伦理考量
约 80% 记录了伦理考量
没有任何 model card 含有正文
所有 model card 都记录了伦理考量

questions.question: What does Pushkarna et al. (Google 2022) Data Cards' telescopic / periscopic / microscopic layering provide?
options: A boundary-object framing where the same document serves different readers (non-experts, ML practitioners, auditors) via three zoom levels of detail
questions.question_zh: Pushkarna et al. (Google 2022) 提出的 Data Cards 中 telescopic / periscopic / microscopic 三层结构带来了什么?
options_zh: 一种边界对象框架: 同一份文档通过三种缩放层级,服务非专家、ML 实践者和审计者等不同读者
一份 RLHF 前的审计 checklist
一个望远镜主题的可视化库
一种保护隐私的查询接口

questions.question: What scope does a System Card cover that Model Cards do not?
options: End-to-end AI system: model + safety stack + deployment context, including security capabilities, prompt-injection protection, data-exfiltration detection, alignment, and incident response
questions.question_zh: System Card 涵盖了哪些 Model Card 不覆盖的范围?
options_zh: 端到端 AI 系统: 模型 + 安全栈 + 部署上下文,包括安全能力、prompt-injection 防护、数据外泄检测、对齐和事故响应
仅数据集
仅 prompt 模板
仅 tokenizer

questions.question: What did Liang et al. (2024) report about model-card detail and Hugging Face download rate?
options: Detailed model cards drive a +29.0% weekly download lift on HF for the treatment group vs control (diff-in-diff); adoption pressure is now market-driven, not only compliance-driven
Detail had no effect on downloads
questions.question_zh: Liang et al. (2024) 关于 model card 详细程度与 Hugging Face 下载量关系的报告是什么?
options_zh: 详尽的 model card 在 HF 上为实验组带来 +29.0% 的周下载量提升 (差中差分析); 采纳压力如今由市场驱动,而不仅仅是合规驱动
只有伦理考量章节会影响下载量
详细程度对下载量没有影响
详细程度反而降低了下载量

questions.question: What does Laminator (Duddu et al. 2024) contribute to documentation?
options: Verifiable attestations via hardware TEE / cryptographic signatures, so the card can carry a proof-of-claim instead of just a claim
A replacement for the Datasheets standard
questions.question_zh: Laminator (Duddu et al. 2024) 给文档化带来了什么?
options_zh: 一个自动化的 benchmark harness
通过硬件 TEE / 密码学签名提供可验证的 attestation,让 card 携带「主张证明」而不仅仅是主张本身
对 Datasheets 标准的替代
基于 LLM 的摘要生成器
